Title: Beyond Semantic Dominance: Cognitive Affective Reasoning and Empathetic Response Alignment in Audio Language Models
Affiliation: Audio, Speech and Language Processing Group (ASLP), Northwestern Polytechnical University
Author: Zhixian Zhao, Shuiyuan Wang, Wenjie Tian, Jingbin Hu, Ziyu Zhang, Lei Xie
Description: CogAudio-LLM is a cognitive affective reasoning framework for audio language models that counters textual semantic dominance over acoustic nuance. It introduces LIME-440K, a lexically-identical multi-emotion dataset for acoustic-semantic decoupling, and EIPS, a four-step chain-of-thought psychological reasoning mechanism, established via multi-stage training to produce empathetic, emotion-aware responses.
